  "findings": [
    "3-way switch miswire identified during testing",
    "Potential failure of emergency egress lighting control override"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit and lock out/tag out",
    "Trace and correct the traveler and common wire terminations at the 3-way switches",
    "Retest the lighting controls and emergency egress override functionality"
  ],
  "rationale": "A 3-way miswire in a commercial lighting control system can prevent emergency egress lighting from functioning correctly or overriding local switches during a power loss or alarm event, violating life safety and electrical codes.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 700.16",
    "NFPA 101 Section 7.9"
  ]
}
